flows.name: wopr-release
flows.description: WOPR release pipeline: prepare -> validate -> deploy -> verify -> done.

states.name: preparing
states.promptTemplate:
Your name is "release-prep-{{entity.refs.linear.id}}". You are on the {{flow.name}} team.

## Assignment
Release: {{entity.refs.linear.key}} — {{entity.refs.linear.title}}
Repo: {{entity.refs.github.repo}}

## Step 1: Verify branch is ready
```bash
gh pr list --repo {{entity.refs.github.repo}} --state merged --limit 10
gh run list --repo {{entity.refs.github.repo}} --limit 5
```

## Step 2: Check all CI checks pass on main
```bash
gh run list --repo {{entity.refs.github.repo}} --branch main --limit 1 --json status,conclusion --jq '.[0]'
```

## Completion
- If ready: send "Ready: {{entity.refs.linear.key}}"
- If not ready: send "Not ready: {{entity.refs.linear.key}} — <reason>"

states.name: deploying
states.promptTemplate:
Your name is "deployer-{{entity.refs.linear.id}}". You are on the {{flow.name}} team.

## Assignment
Release: {{entity.refs.linear.key}} — {{entity.refs.linear.title}}
Repo: {{entity.refs.github.repo}}

## Step 1: Trigger deployment
```bash
gh workflow run deploy.yml --repo {{entity.refs.github.repo}} --ref main
```

## Step 2: Wait for deployment to complete
```bash
gh run list --repo {{entity.refs.github.repo}} --workflow deploy.yml --limit 1 --json status,conclusion,url
```
Poll every 30 seconds until status is completed.

## Completion
- If succeeded: send "Deployed: {{entity.refs.linear.key}}"
- If failed: send "Deploy failed: {{entity.refs.linear.key}} — <error>"

states.name: verifying
states.promptTemplate:
Your name is "verifier-{{entity.refs.linear.id}}". You are on the {{flow.name}} team.

## Assignment
Release: {{entity.refs.linear.key}} — {{entity.refs.linear.title}}
Repo: {{entity.refs.github.repo}}

## Step 1: Run smoke tests
```bash
gh run list --repo {{entity.refs.github.repo}} --workflow smoke-test.yml --limit 1 --json status,conclusion
```

## Step 2: Check deployment health
Verify the deployment endpoint is responding correctly.

## Completion
- If healthy: send "Verified: {{entity.refs.linear.key}}"
- If unhealthy: send "Verify failed: {{entity.refs.linear.key}} — <reason>"

constraints.description: Release pipeline blocked. Requires human intervention.
